textByHash.0284c0feadfea5df9013736f672afdf0d03b9994: Ah Romeo, yes. A fine lad, but a little bit confused.
textByHash.0b5e9a057a210758577efbbcc22f6bca0815577c: To err is human, to forgive, quite difficult.
textByHash.0ee186b789c23a56f6ab6fa126c3fcd9de33ff39: Ok, ok...what do you want so I can get rid of you and continue with my sermon?
textByHash.115e26eb43004184081e8591708abc805d0c64db: I heard some kids saying they saw some the other day. They were visiting the mining place to the south east of Varrock.
textByHash.137bca45790461a77d8e698a1eea83fa554da8de: I sing and I drink and I wake up in gutters.
textByHash.14f9f009dcfe76b5449f94720f0e25d48d68403a: Ah, have you found the Apothecary yet? Remember, Cadava potion, for Juliet.
textByHash.179f43d115f342c550ffee22d36b7fb0cb4a74c6: The potion will only make Juliet 'appear' dead...then she'll be taken to the crypt...
textByHash.245fe7ba58aa65a660a987be1cbc5b7c53db7f11: But the Blue Moon in the city is cheap enough.
textByHash.26f7254f28775534f70155f509cecbc8a8f8b5f0: I need a think I drink.
textByHash.29788801d1c41733e2a10bfe53417b96ce1e49c3: Well, good luck with that...they're quite tricky to find.
textByHash.47afbc2bfa5cfd30296e4603e4dc2bc4be22fa57: I am sure he can use some help.
textByHash.68d1d6b8170396fa148f4e07b4b9ea53740399ce: But I'm busy delivering a sermon to my congregation!
textByHash.6e574fbaa8233f27c021c80f2f5f7e8628113aab: I was helping him and Juliet to meet, but it became impossible.
textByHash.711b5d2d0ae410507205021af95a1eb026681c96: Then Romeo can collect her from the crypt! Go to the Apothecary, tell him I sent you and that you'll need a 'Cadava' potion.
textByHash.71f05938c1787f191c2b65170df58afd99b9199e: And providing you buy one drink an hour they let you stay all night.
textByHash.757cc57777e3ff537d6ef9be20b11da58014ae72: Oh to be a father in the times of whiskey.
textByHash.7f13b49b25cb4a45dcbcfed4c3771009f8e8b223: Hello adventurer, do you seek a quest?
textByHash.867bb16391b6bd937c17a77287e1d2aaad613ab1: That's a fine career in these lands. There is more that needs killing every day.
textByHash.8fb87aedab2bab0c184ad66133fbaa15696dd4f8: Well, I see poor Romeo wandering around the square. I think he may need help.
textByHash.94d34d910fd556d14c35d85e63a6ad29d5c726d1: Can't you see that I'm in the middle of a Sermon?!
textByHash.9955f862fda9349e2cc75acf4c2012461f17114d: ''...and let Saradomin light the way for you... '' Urgh!
textByHash.a642f885f78768215379c284b5820f79e37c8901: Top of the morning to you.
textByHash.bad5c569d57f40178a4474766bb2cc2af66100e3: I agree, and I think I have an idea! A potion to make her appear dead...
textByHash.de443a59ca09e156d39ef4ae2b937ed6973342fe: in nomine saradomini, blah blah blah...
textByHash.ecfdb394278030876b9caf67db2f61457e9dca66: Drinking will be the death of you.
textByHash.f6746934b9d9e0c7f7b06c7b20f93581cf14e38c: Good! Good work! Ok, take it to Juliet, she's expecting you. I'll talk to Romeo and make sure he knows what to do.
textByHash.f701304a10b3fc155675a4d66ee6277deb4163f7: I'd give you a reward, but you don't seem to have any space for it. Come back when you do.
